job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst
Company: BlueCross BlueShield of Tennessee
Source: Indeed
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=2e9338e41901621a

- Fully remote healthcare data analyst role.
- Supports provider consultation and analytics around healthcare costs and quality improvement.
- Notes that sponsorship is not available.

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | Payer Analytics | SQL | Cost & Quality Reporting
replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted payer-oriented data across claims, member, provider, and reporting workflows. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, data quality, source-to-target testing, and healthcare analytics supporting cost, quality, and operational decision-making.
replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.

replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), payer reporting support
replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)

replacements.replace: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards, quality metrics, and downstream KPIs.
replacements.find: Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards and downstream KPIs.

gaps: Consultation/analytics role may expect more direct business storytelling
notes: High-priority full-time target. Tailoring emphasizes payer data, SQL, Tableau/Power BI reporting, and healthcare cost/quality analysis.
